name: Ham and Cheese Potatoes Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes, ham, and onion in a greased 1-quart casserole; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat; stir in flour until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
4. Add cheese, salt, and pepper; stir until the cheese melts.
5. Pour the cheese mixture over the potato mixture and gently stir to combine.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until bubbly.
7. Garnish with parsley.
Yield: 2 servings
